title: Wire: WebSocket ping/pong keepalive
description:
No heartbeat is currently sent. Mobile clients behind NAT will have their TCP connections silently killed by carrier NAT after ~30-90 seconds of idle. The relay will not know the client disconnected until the next send attempt fails.

Required:
- Relay sends WebSocket Ping frame every 30 seconds
- Client (axum/tokio-tungstenite) auto-responds with Pong (tungstenite does this by default)
- If no Pong received within 10 seconds, disconnect and clean up client entry from DashMap
- Add keepalive interval as env var: KEEPALIVE_SECS=30
